functions.name: atan
functions.description: Returns the arcTan of the specified tan ratio measured in radians.

functions.name: line
functions.description: Draws a line between the specified points using the specified colour

functions.name: log10
functions.description: Returns the base-10 logarithm of the specified value.  This is similar to log10 from WebLogo.

functions.name: pen
functions.description: Sets the pen width used in lines.  This is similar to WebLogo's setPenSize command.

functions.name: pi
functions.description: Returns the value of pi.  The pBasic documentation combined with examples are a little confusing on this, though.  At least one example from the pBasic project assigns a number to a 'pi' variable.

functions.name: sqr
functions.description: Returns the square of the specified number

functions.name: sqrt
functions.description: Returns the square root of the specified number

functions.name: time
functions.description: Returns a representation of the current time.  This is similar to time$ in QBasic or animation.time in WebLogo.
